content: Home delivery for printed tutes typically takes 3-5 working days after payment verification 😊. Tracking details will be provided via WhatsApp once the package is dispatched.

Online students usually receive PDF tutes via WhatsApp 😊. If you specifically need printed tutes, please contact Mr. Sampath Kumara directly at 077 123 4567 to discuss it. We do not provide prices or delivery promises here. However, students who have completed payment and are eligible for printed materials will have their printed tutes delivered directly to their home address.
Please send your new details (Name, Phone no, School, or Grade) clearly in the chat 😊. I will update your profile in the system immediately.
Adeon Science Class specializes in O/L Sinhala Medium Science 😊. We cover Biology, Physics, Chemistry, revision programs, model papers, and past paper discussions.
Science classes are conducted by Mr. Sampath Kumara, who has 10+ years of experience in O/L Science coaching and a proven track record of helping students achieve 'A' results.
Students who miss live Zoom classes can access the class recordings through the official WhatsApp group 😊. Recording access is available for a limited period of 30 days.
Class fees are non-refundable 😊. If you have a special situation or issue regarding your payment, please contact Mr. Sampath Kumara directly at 0771234567 for further assistance.
For admissions, fee inquiries, or technical support, contact Mr. Sampath Kumara (Sir) directly via WhatsApp at 077 123 4567. Replies are sent during working hours 😊

The WhatsApp group is set to "Admin Only" to prevent spam and ensure you see important notices 😊. If you have a question, please message this official Admin chat or ask during the live class Q&A session.

Our standard fee applies to all students to maintain class quality 😊. However, you may request a special concession by messaging Mr. Sampath Kumara directly with your details. I cannot promise a discount myself.

PDF materials are usually sent about 1 hour before class 😊. Physical class students receive printed tutes at the entrance. Online students who are eligible for printed tutes will receive them through home delivery. Please also check the 'Media/Docs' section in your WhatsApp group.
Please leave the Zoom meeting and rejoin 😊. Make sure you selected 'Join with Audio' or 'Wifi/Mobile Data'. If it still doesn't work, check your internet connection or wait for the recording.
Please check the latest pinned announcement in the WhatsApp group 😊. The regular schedule is followed unless Mr. Sampath Kumara posts a change in the group.
I'm sorry for the inconvenience 😊. Let me check this for you. An Admin will contact you shortly to assist further.
Class recordings are available for missed sessions 😊. Recordings are usually available for a limited period only (typically 30 days). Recording links will be shared in the official WhatsApp group.
Thank you for the receipt! 😊 The Admin will verify your payment and approve access within 24 hours. You will receive a confirmation once added to the official WhatsApp group.
We offer both Physical Classes in Nugegoda, Colombo, and Online Classes via Zoom 😊. Both follow the same syllabus, discussions, and teaching quality.

Students can ask science-related doubts through WhatsApp 😊. Your questions will be noted and passed to the Tutor, and they will get back to you with the explanation. Concept clarification support is also available to ensure no student falls behind.
Regular classes are usually not conducted on Poya days or national holidays 😊. If special classes are scheduled, announcements will be posted in the WhatsApp group.

🆕 New students නම්, registration complete කරලා පසුව payment කරන්න 😊

⭕ Payment receipt එකේ *Name, WhatsApp Number, Paid Month, Grade* කියන details *pen එකෙන්* ලියලා එවීම අනිවාර්යයි.
❌ *එසේ නොමැති slips accept කරන්නේ නැහැ.*

🪯 Online Payment කරනවා නම්, payment කරන වෙලාවේ *Description / Remark* වලට class එකට සම්බන්ධ වෙන *WhatsApp Number* එක දාන්න.
❌ *එසේ නොමැති payments accept කරන්නේ නැහැ.*

📝 Tippex කරපු, කුරුටු ගාපු හෝ *පැහැදිලි නැති receipts* භාරගන්නේ නැහැ.

📍 Details ලියද්දී වැරදුනොත්, *single line එකකින් cut කරලා* නිවැරදි කරන්න.

💙 ලංකාවේ quality ම ONLINE SCIENCE CLASS එක

🛑 *Sampath Kumara*
BSc.(Sp) University of Peradeniya
📞 0771234567 (Hotline)
